name: Paddington
heroAlt: Custom joinery and kitchen fitout reference suited to Paddington terrace renovations
metaTitle: Custom Joinery & Renovations Paddington | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Paddington custom joinery and renovation services for terrace homes and apartments. Kitchens, wardrobes, bathrooms and concealed storage. Free quotes. Call us today.
intro: Paddington terraces are among the most renovated homes in Sydney — and for good reason. The bones are usually excellent, but the original layout rarely suits how people live today. A well-planned joinery scope can transform a Paddington terrace: a kitchen that opens properly, a bathroom that feels resolved, wardrobes that actually hold everything, and storage integrated into walls and stairwells that were previously wasted.
localContext: Working within the constraints of a terrace — narrow frontage, vertical living, heritage overlay in some streets — requires joinery that is planned around the architecture rather than imposed on it. That is the kind of work we enjoy.
projectReferenceNote: The Darlinghurst fitout is the closest reference we have for the Paddington terrace environment — same style of home, same storage challenges, same need for joinery that works with the building rather than against it.
whyChoose: Terrace renovation experience with joinery designed around narrow, vertical floor plans
Concealed storage, stairwell joinery and under-stair solutions
Kitchen and bathroom renovation in heritage-adjacent properties
Material direction that respects the character of older homes while lifting the finish

faqs.question: Do you renovate kitchens in Paddington terraces?
faqs.answer: Yes. We take on kitchen renovations in terrace homes regularly. We understand the challenges of working with constrained layouts, original walls and older service locations.

faqs.question: Can you build concealed storage into a terrace stairwell or hallway?
faqs.answer: Yes. Custom joinery built into stairwells, under stairs and along hallways is one of the most effective ways to add storage to a terrace without changing the floor plan.

faqs.question: Do I need council approval for internal joinery work in Paddington?
faqs.answer: Internal joinery and renovation work generally does not require council approval unless it involves structural changes. We can help clarify the scope during the quoting process.

faqs.question: Can you match the style of an existing renovation already underway?
faqs.answer: Yes. If a renovation is already in progress, we can review what has been specified and match the material and finish direction across the joinery scope.

ctaText: If your Paddington terrace is ready for a kitchen renovation, new wardrobes or smarter storage built into the home, we can help make the most of the space.
